subject: This Swamper Needs to Go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
She is horrible |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=43e558bb03&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots who take on the Swamp, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=05c74402c6&e=ba6e67b849)!

**We want America First patriots in Congress. Patriots who, like President Trump, will fight the Marxists and never give up on America.**

One of the Swampers who hates President Trump and does not stand up for America is Liz Cheney.

It seems like every day, she finds a new way to go on CNN or MSNBC and dunk on Republicans. Liz Cheny is VILE!
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b5975bd50c&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Liz Cheney went on FOX and shredded Trump again last week.

_“If Donald Trump were the 2024 nominee, would you support him?” Cavuto asked. “I would not,” Cheney replied without hesitation.

Cheney has been vocal about her belief that Trump played a large role in causing the Capitol insurrection on January 6, one of the few Republicans to do so, and voted to impeach him because of it. On Wednesday, Cheney doubled down._

_“I’ve been very clear about my views of what happened on January 6, about my views of the president’s culpability,” Cheney said. “I obviously voted to impeach him. I think that it was the gravest violation of an oath of office by any president in American history, and I’m gonna continue to make sure people understand that.”

Trump has slammed Cheney, along with any other Republican who shares her beliefs, and Wednesday was no different. In a statement following the interview, Trump called Cheney “crazy” and said he’d “soon” endorse a primary challenger._

Liz Cheney IS crazy. She hates America and is only in politics for personal benefit. Trump will soon endorse a primary opponent to replace her in 2022; we have to follow his lead!

**We need to change Congress, and the Republicans we send there must be fighters!**

[We are not woke corporate elites. We depend on you to help us put patriots in a place to succeed!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=848fca6080&e=ba6e67b849)

| **Picture a Congress with 300 Marjorie Taylor Greenes .[Help us elect strong patriots!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=8259261a23&e=ba6e67b849)**

The Swamp needs to be replaced! Don't let the Swamp beat good candidates. Let's stand for the Constitution together!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Independent Cook Political Report Says Charlie Crist's Seat is now EVEN!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f55534982ba1/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-3745270?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

As I have said for years, South Pinellas County's Florida-13 i _s_ a _**winnable district for Republicans with THE RIGHT conservative candidate who can appeal to the majority of voters in this district. **_

But don't just take my word for it - the king of rating political districts, **Charlie Cook agrees** that not only is **Florida now more red than ever,** **but FL-13 is now EVENLY split for Republicans and Democrats, making it up for grabs in 2022!**

**_"Cook now rates Democratic Rep. Charlie Crist’s 13th Congressional District as an even split, even though the most recent voter book closing gave Democrats a 5-point advantage in registrations. In 2017, CD 13 was D+2." _**_(See link to full article below) _

**With a conservative that supports the _Make America First Agenda_ , we need only _TWO SEATS_ to WIN BACK THE HOUSE in 2022!**
* _Stop Big Tech from limiting conservative speech_
* _Stop Democrats from taking away our Second Amendment right to bear arms_
* _Stop Biden's 'Catch and Release' program and re-instate Trump's successful policies like 'Remain in Mexico' and continuing to build the wall to re-enforce our southern border_
* _Stop defunding efforts of our law enforcement _
* _Stop roll backs of Trump-era tax cuts and continue Trump-era limitations of business regulations so our post COVID economy can thrive again_
* _Empower Americans to make the best decisions for themselves instead of enacting restrictive and business crushing COVID laws_

__With Democrats controlling the House, Senate and the White House, and an out of control Congress seeking to pack the U.S Supreme Court with four more liberal activist judges, grant D.C. two Democrat Senators to tip the balance in the Senate to 52-20, NOW more than EVER, conservatives need to take the House back!_ _

---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d1dadb4446&e=c2296cffff)
---
_**On Newsmax TV, April 15, 2021,****** I discuss why Sen Rubio will win in 2022 and why Florida is no longer a 'battleground' state_
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=e3e62ed30b&e=c2296cffff)
---
_**On Newsmax TV, April 11, 2021,** I discuss why Governor Ron DeSantis fires back at BIG TECH for censoring his COVID Roundtable Video_
|
# **April 19, 2021 - Cook Political Report reddens Florida congressional districts:
**__https://floridapolitics.com/archives/420993-cook-report-reddens-florida-congressional-districts/__
* * *

I would love to hear your thoughts on this! Please feel free to email me directly. Also, to see my television appearances on a variety of political topics, please follow me on:

Thank you!
Amanda Makki

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Tell Joe Biden: “No, Thank you”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
body:
Peter,
It's always the same song - liberals respond
to crime by looking to legislate ways to take guns away from
law-abiding citizens. They claim it is all about "keeping us
safe," but here is the truth: when the politicians finally
succeed in taking away your Second Amendment rights, they will
then be free to take away your First Amendment rights.
That is always the knee jerk solution for
them - take away the rights of the people.
NO, THANK YOU.
The Founding Fathers of this nation were
trying to escape a tyrannical government that controlled their
lives - that is WHY they included the Second Amendment, and it is
why I fight so hard to protect it.
Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden
should spend more time supporting law enforcement efforts to take
criminals off the streets instead of treating our brave police
officers like punching bags to appease their radical base. If
they get their way, Antifa and radical BLM activists will be
patrolling our communities instead of your local police force.
That is why I am asking for your help so I
can stand up to their attacks and Protect our 2nd Amendment
Rights. I need every conservative standing beside me if we are
going to keep the radical left from trampling on more of our
freedom.

STAND WITH JOSH

As always, the left is coming after me with
everything they have. Between my fight to protect your First
Amendment rights against Big Tech, and now the battle to protect
your Second Amendment Rights from Joe Biden and his radical
leftist friends in Congress, let's just say I am not popular with
the DC cocktail scene.
The Democrats in power have no boundaries, no
sense of decency - they will do anything or say anything to
control every decision you make. They fight to defund the police
and then to take away your right to defend yourself.
If we give up, nothing will stand between you
and the Antifa mobs currently burning down our cities.
I won't give up, and I hope you won't either.
Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $25 could
make all the difference.
Please don't give up.
For America,

Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri

STAND WITH JOSH

PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
SENATE

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

© 2021 USA Freedom Fighters

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Tell your Senator to say no to earmarks today!
body:
| |
---
**There is a vote Wednesday, and we must stop earmarks from returning!**

Earmarks may seem unimportant or arcane, but if they are brought back, the left may use them to buy off support for one of their awful, radical bills, like the Corrupt Politicians Act, or statehood for D.C., or packing the Supreme Court, and so on.
Use the information below to call and tweet these Senators to urge them to come out publicly against reinstating earmarks! The Tweets are super simple! Just ensure you are logged into Twitter, then click the link, and click the “Tweet” button to send the tweet.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We need to hear from you by April 28th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need to hear from you by April 28th as to whether or not you'll be a part of our 2022 comeback team. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)
---
**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:** A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our "2022 comeback team"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress next November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We're still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we've set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Wednesday, April 28th.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn't fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don't do anything dumb. Democrats haven't gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they're acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don't remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They've added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just two months and they're eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)
That's a mistake.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our "2022 comeback team"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress next November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We're still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we've set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Wednesday, April 28th**.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57881620:WK5GabdNf:m:1:2247059263:263C7945A69F8401FAC1B10E711DBD9C:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 25, 2020.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWK5GabdNf). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWK5GabdNf)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWK5GabdNf) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-65016110395-echo3-0DC056BC530401B7296243E6E0EE3DC9@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

[](http://www.campaignsolutions.com)**

name: Action (LeftAction)
subject: Petition: "Don't give Trump a book deal"
body:
There is NO WAY Trump should be able to profit off the lies, misery, carnage and treason he was responsible for.
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/trump-book-e?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend,
### [Sign the Petition: "Don't give Trump a book deal!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b414017-a3a9-463b-b0f5-2143703ceff4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
With news breaking that Trump officials have gotten lucrative book deals (including [William Barr](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f89ecd3-6015-43d6-9846-26f4b9f59b68/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), possibly the worst Attorney General ever), and rumors that Trump is on the verge as well, **we need to send a clear message to publishers:** [**“Don’t Give Trump a Book Deal!”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbbc826e8-1016-4bc3-8be9-dfb13310640b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) There is NO WAY Trump should be able to profit off the lies, misery, carnage and treason he was responsible for. Publishers should not give him a deal, and if any have already been negotiated in secret, they should be cancelled. [**Send a message: “Don’t Give Trump a Book Deal!”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eda9095-bdff-43a4-bed2-8d8a0a44df7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27e1c9b4-5ebf-4a1e-adc2-7032857624f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
**Want to take action on another front? Here's a few options:**
* [List of current LeftAction actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8716b86-96e9-4112-9076-716b80afe788/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* Want more? Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90c8ea75-d41c-47f0-b7de-05ec77549b70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e76d93a-de7d-4b19-989e-d0c6f69d609e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* If you can, [make a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95a87d20-8d75-4f2c-adb7-9d77726a6e6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to help us cover expenses
* Want to unsubscribe? Click the link below.

| Thanks again for taking action, and helping fight back! LeftAction

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Who is behind O’Keefe’s ban?
body:
My friend James O’Keefe is all over the news after Twitter banned his personal account last week.
---
My friend James O’Keefe is all over the news after Twitter banned his personal account last week.

| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/kzKVKeVplEf6rrItAtxHkvmp5yhQZ0tzU4X_q5cOy9glMO18JfYqpWTVbC1w6eKL762DePo9Wva2P40tx53gfeRPwyqfSTSIMJTlExSNYhKbDfGrJVuHH8rF9qL_LDkDyeYVp_bIeGuWrHqtDuDFifvDplW7Uw2J071qQisp7lWP8OXHp745VFHtsrlgK7sUatMQhnpeJ2ou_81LNez5uo1XET3WZ8P0ISF_cDDjpSvScFO8XFd7ijW4xfyXZGe4SXgHTOUp7ZL6ROjDrB_Jwo0v3vNngAkLFGONZRCekhmoESpJJHaLQg) My friend James O’Keefe is all over the news after Twitter banned his personal account last week.

In February, Project Veritas’ company account was permanently suspended and it’s no coincidence why.

In January, PV struck at the core of Twitter’s censorship by publishing undercover video of Vijaya Gadde, the head of “Trust & Safety” at Twitter.

Basically, Gadde is Twitter’s Head-Gestapo-in-Charge of bans.

It seems she took it a bit personally that her video was shown to the world by Project Veritas.

But Gadde’s bias is on view for all to see if you just take a look at her political giving history.

The top Twitter executive has made $13,600 in donations to candidates – **100% Democrat**.

And it should be no surprise that last year, Twitter employees as a whole donated nearly a cool million to candidates, with 98% of their support going to Democrats.

Their bias is overwhelming and has infected EVERY aspect of their jobs.

**And it’s impacting all of us.**

It’s illegally influencing our elections.

It’s manipulating our culture by silencing opposing views.

It’s limiting our access to information – **sometimes even life-saving information**.

I’m in the midst of a new lawsuit that will bring the hammer down on Big Tech and expose their corruption – [**help me get it in court by donating today**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/-z497uOrV8mHRDM0WVSa3oAahZcx4uGuLEERjKPVIhd_sGOp76n0C2EdXAtGQjmr_Olg8V-dseyyoXPzmw4YU6yGEtTpjtZ7CDHi6CJ-0yvmdP_rGtUSNoYL18jscloWFLVPBRV4hxIW6DhCwi8FJ9FVfAWz6-07B2lC0hFR7JOQ8bjBW3cy-wxkL5nDWNa4jCaf8Two-IJoc7ommar0zXb_9PIsz5uNWn6ojFFfNpv08-BdHB0bsKsX6lj_8TXri3Vys-Ifk0Ne84R7ssOJoPhg517Sc5nIDDrdfjqXIQBhJ2VGSM-YEQ).

I have a team of attorneys pouring over every action, every statement and every policy change made by the Big Tech Mafia over the last several years.

So far, this has cost nearly $60,000 just in the research and preparation – **and it will be worth it**.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Maxine Waters Threatened Them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter, Democrats like Maxine Waters encouraged violent
riots in the streets from BLM and ANTIFA.
I've introducing a resolution to EXPEL Maxine
Waters from Congress!
Sign your petition and urge your elected
officials to hold the hate-America leftist Maxine Waters
accountable!

Nancy Pelosi doubled down on her hypocrisy
and claimed Maxine Waters should "absolutely not" apologize.

This is the time for Republicans to get tough
and hold Democrats in Congress accountable for their hate-America
violent rhetoric.
That's why I'm introducing a resolution to
EXPEL Maxine Waters from Congress!

Sign your petition and urge your elected
officials to join my resolution!
For years, Maxine Waters has incited
BLM/Antifa violence and riots.
And for four straight years, she was a top
lieutenant to Nancy Pelosi in their witch-hunt impeachment sham
against President Trump.
It's time Republicans fight back and let
these hate-America Democrats like Maxine Waters know: enough is
enough! You will not keep America hostage.

TELL NANCY PELOSI: EXPEL MAXINE WATERS! SIGN
YOUR PETITION

Maxine Waters must be expelled from Congress!

-- Marjorie Taylor
Greene

Box 700442 San Antonio, Texas 78270 == | | Tony Gonzales for Congress | 11613 Huebner Rd, San Antonio, TX 78248 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

| | |
### Christie55 In The News
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6d47ef68d8&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Martha MacCallum Show**

**Chris Christie: Republicans need to call out Biden when he lies**

Former New Jersey Governor says the president's infrastructure plan is a 'liberal wish list' on 'The Story'

[_Watch Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=34b9ddfa20&e=65ae29fa7e)
|

| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=168841ca68&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Brian Kilmeade Show**

**Chris Christie: If FDR Couldn’t Pull Off Packing The Supreme Court I’m Not Worried About Jerry Nadler & Ed Markey Doing It**

Chris Christie: If FDR Couldn’t Pull Off Packing The Supreme Court I’m Not Worried About Jerry Nadler & Ed Markey Doing It

[_Listen Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=9b799add07&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=918617a71e&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**The Ingraham Angle**

**Governor Christie: Call Biden out as 'a Liar'**

[_Watch Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=b7631547a8&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=2d4305926c&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**NY Post**

**Chris Christie claims Biden ‘lying’ about infrastructure package**

“You cannot call a $400 billion plan to force unionization in states, to say that taking care of increasing Medicaid payments in states, is infrastructure,” Christie said on ABC’s “This Week.”

[_Read More_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=5283970be2&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6153d46f9e&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Real Clear Politics**

**Christie to GOP Study Group: Call Biden Out as 'a Liar'**

This was the message Christie delivered to the Republican Study Committee during a packed private lunch at the Capitol Hill Club. The governor has quickly emerged as the preeminent GOP brawler post-Trump, sparring on ABC’s “This Week” each Sunday with anchor George Stephanopoulos and former Chicago Mayor (and Obama chief of staff) Rahm Emanuel. On Wednesday, he was greeted as such by the largest caucus in the new GOP minority.

[_Read More_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=658055e7dc&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=62902d8da8&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Fox News**

**Chris Christie turns into Biden attack dog in early days of administration**

"Now language does matter. We learned that in the last four years. How you use it and what you say, and I said last week that the president’s not telling the truth, and he’s not telling the truth about the infrastructure package," [Christie] explained.

[_Read More_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=34a9a7642f&e=65ae29fa7e)
|

---
**ABC News**

**Voters want lawmakers 'talking about the future': Chris Christie**

The Powerhouse Roundtable breaks down the latest news on "This Week."

[_Watch Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=fa4e922241&e=65ae29fa7e)

From Kenosha burning to the unemployment insurance debacle to a botched vaccine rollout, voters are fed up with Tony Evers’ failures and are starved for real leadership. After 30 of our supported conservative candidates won their races in Wisconsin, I believe we can turn the governor’s race from a toss-up to a Republican victory. But as always, victory will depend on grassroots leaders like you. I know how critical of a role you played when you fought by my side during my past campaigns. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Tim Scott
subject: Why conservatives need to fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Conservatives are going to have to re-engage and fight for the soul of our nation, or we will lose it.

Friend,

Conservatives are going to have to re-engage and fight for the soul of our nation, or we will lose it.

Because as Democrats and their woke Left allies attempt to socially re-engineer America, we're facing the erosion of truth.

For instance, Democrats just passed a "COVID relief" bill with almost no money for COVID relief but billions for liberal priorities. And the woke Left recently pushed the MLB to boycott Georgia for passing voter ID, but now they're just doing business with a blue state that has Voter ID.

This angers me, Friend. I think "woke" is wacky and I think that cancel culture should be canceled. But the Left's politically correct discrimination is only getting worse.

[**Will you join me and your fellow conservatives in fighting back against the woke Left?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/radical-woke-left/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210420_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1058539-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210420_why-conservatives-need-to-fight/)

Conservatives still have a chance to stop the Left's transformation of America, but we need to step up right now. Democrats are working as fast as they can and cancel culture is consuming more of our nation with each passing day.

[**You can help conservatives stop the woke Left by pitching in $25, $50, or more right now.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/radical-woke-left/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210420_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1058539-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210420_why-conservatives-need-to-fight/)

I know we can save America because conservatives like you are willing to fight for it. Thanks for your support, Friend.

Tim Scott

clean_body: Conservatives are going to have to re-engage and fight for the soul of our nation, or we will lose it. Friend, Conservatives are going to have to re-engage and fight for the soul of our nation, or we will lose it. Because as Democrats and their woke Left allies attempt to socially re-engineer America, we're facing the erosion of truth. For instance, Democrats just passed a "COVID relief" bill with almost no money for COVID relief but billions for liberal priorities. And the woke Left recently pushed the MLB to boycott Georgia for passing voter ID, but now they're just doing business with a blue state that has Voter ID. This angers me, Friend. I think "woke" is wacky and I think that cancel culture should be canceled. But the Left's politically correct discrimination is only getting worse. Conservatives still have a chance to stop the Left's transformation of America, but we need to step up right now. Democrats are working as fast as they can and cancel culture is consuming more of our nation with each passing day. I know we can save America because conservatives like you are willing to fight for it. Thanks for your support, Friend. name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: I Was Just With President Trump At Mar a Lago
body:
I wanted you to be the first to know I had the opportunity to speak 1-on-1 with President Trump and see the fabulous picture we took together. | | | Dear Patriot,

On Saturday Night I attended the Palm Beach Republican Party Lincoln Day Dinner at Mar a Lago, home to President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump.
---
| |
---
While I was there, I had the opportunity to speak one on one with President Trump.

I wanted you to be the first to know and see the fabulous picture we took together before we went into the event.

**_President Trump and I had a great conversation._**

I look forward to sitting down with him at Mar a Lago in the near future.
---
| As you know, in 2020, the first time I ran for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District, I had the honor of receiving President Trump’s endorsement, and his vote, as well as First Lady Melania Trump’s vote. I have since filed to run for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District again for the 2022 election.

As the **MOST BANNED WOMAN IN THE WORLD** and the first deplatformed candidate in US history, I know first hand what Donald Trump is experiencing now that he has been deplatformed by social media, and debanked by payment processors and numerous banks. The same thing happened to me, which is why I am the most qualified person to represent President Trump in Congress. But, I can’t get to Congress without you.

**Please[ support](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=69a384f595&e=4d7c0901a7) my campaign today with whatever you can afford.**

I was inspired to run for Congress to ensure that no American citizen ever has to experience what I’ve experienced while being banned on all social media, and when I get elected to Congress, I will work to break up Big Tech and hold them accountable for their discriminatory and anti-competitive business practices, and their illegal, coordinated, and sinister election interference.

_As President Trump once famously said, “Never, ever give up.” I will never give up in the fight to save America, or the fight to Stop the Bias by Big Tech! That’s my promise to you, the voters of Florida’s 21 st District, and all Americans._

Help me send a message to the Washington Establishment and Big Tech tyrants so we can tell them we wont allow them to steal our elections!
---
| |
---
| Can I count on you to contribute [$25](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=fb0c35abc6&e=4d7c0901a7), [$50](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=bd0265b82a&e=4d7c0901a7), [$100](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=c09481d9df&e=4d7c0901a7), or a max donation of [$2,900](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=42defe59ce&e=4d7c0901a7) today to help my campaign hit our second quarter goal?
---
| [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=e60c2a20f7&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
|
---
| **Please donate today and help send a real fighter to Congress!**

Thank you so much for your [support](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=2cd9f1a40f&e=4d7c0901a7)!

Truthfully
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer

name: Joe Sweeney
subject: Can you help us Flip the U.S. Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
We need your help to Defeat the Democrats.
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fflip-the-senate/1/01000178ef726c31-23410673-9a38-4ee8-bc4b-86f0560e942b-000000/p31DKIT0XpJ65l0ELXOZ5bO_CsI=210)
Derek,
Democrats continue to push a radical and out-of-touch agenda. It’s time to put a stop to their abuse of power, and take back control of the US Senate. Since taking control over the Senate only a few months ago, Democrats have done none of the unifying that they claimed they wanted, and instead have simply used their new-found influence to blow out massive spending and attack our constitutional rights. We need to put an end to their power-grab before they fundamentally change our country for the worse.
Since taking power, Democrats have pushed unsustainable spending, attacks on the constitution, and have recently **opened the door to packing the Supreme Court.** They know their agenda is unpopular, so they’ve done everything they can to disguise their true intentions. Starting with what they claimed was a “COVID Relief Bill” which spent only a small percentage addressing the pandemic, Democrats have had no problem lying to get their way. Now they want to federalize our election laws by stripping the people of their ability to maintain election integrity. And their agenda gets even more ambitious. By adding radical leftist Justices to the Supreme Court, granting statehood to Washington D.C., and passing their federal election takeover, Democrats have proven they will go to any lengths necessary to silence hardworking Americans and keep their party in power.
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fflip-the-senate/2/01000178ef726c31-23410673-9a38-4ee8-bc4b-86f0560e942b-000000/Hga_Xil_wxU3G04n2EkzA-SWMxI=210)
Our path to a Senate majority comes one election and one vote at a time. The Democrats have already shown their hand and they know that the momentum is on our side. Recently, in a desperate attempt to cling to their slim majority, they released a list of Senators that they know are in trouble. Included on this list were Raphael Warnock (GA), Mark Kelly (AZ), Catherine Cortez Mastro (NV), and Maggie Hassan (NH). They’ve already begun dumping their corrupt DC money into these states and it will only get worse as the 2022 elections draw closer.
[If everyone opening this email chips in $5, $10, $20.22, or even $50 today we'll empower our party to **FLIP** the United States Senate and put a definitive stop to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris' agenda.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fflip-the-senate/3/01000178ef726c31-23410673-9a38-4ee8-bc4b-86f0560e942b-000000/pv1eX0HudYO8pt4qGZ5VSnbiy84=210) Your donation would go to great lengths to support the Republican Parties in New Hampshire, Georgia, Arizona, and Nevada and assist our efforts to take back control of the United States Senate.
Please join us in our efforts to [Flip the US Senate](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fflip-the-senate/4/01000178ef726c31-23410673-9a38-4ee8-bc4b-86f0560e942b-000000/EyOYxrD5qwoF6Csx3wwFlOWSohI=210) in 2022. Democrats have already begun to spend massive amounts of money defending their incumbents and it is crucial that we not fall behind. clean_body: We need your help to Defeat the Democrats. Derek, Democrats continue to push a radical and out-of-touch agenda. It’s time to put a stop to their abuse of power, and take back control of the US Senate. Since taking control over the Senate only a few months ago, Democrats have done none of the unifying that they claimed they wanted, and instead have simply used their new-found influence to blow out massive spending and attack our constitutional rights. We need to put an end to their power-grab before they fundamentally change our country for the worse. Since taking power, Democrats have pushed unsustainable spending, attacks on the constitution, and have recently opened the door to packing the Supreme Court. They know their agenda is unpopular, so they’ve done everything they can to disguise their true intentions. Starting with what they claimed was a “COVID Relief Bill” which spent only a small percentage addressing the pandemic, Democrats have had no problem lying to get their way. Now they want to federalize our election laws by stripping the people of their ability to maintain election integrity. And their agenda gets even more ambitious. By adding radical leftist Justices to the Supreme Court, granting statehood to Washington D.C., and passing their federal election takeover, Democrats have proven they will go to any lengths necessary to silence hardworking Americans and keep their party in power. Our path to a Senate majority comes one election and one vote at a time. The Democrats have already shown their hand and they know that the momentum is on our side. Recently, in a desperate attempt to cling to their slim majority, they released a list of Senators that they know are in trouble. Included on this list were Raphael Warnock (GA), Mark Kelly (AZ), Catherine Cortez Mastro (NV), and Maggie Hassan (NH). They’ve already begun dumping their corrupt DC money into these states and it will only get worse as the 2022 elections draw closer. Your donation would go to great lengths to support the Republican Parties in New Hampshire, Georgia, Arizona, and Nevada and assist our efforts to take back control of the United States Senate. Please join us in our efforts to in 2022. Democrats have already begun to spend massive amounts of money defending their incumbents and it is crucial that we not fall behind. These are going to be some of the most expensive midterm elections in U.S. history and Kindest regards, Joe Sweeney NHGOP Executive Director P.S. The 2022 elections are slated to be the most expensive elections in our nation's history. Democrats will spend millions to Defend their Senate Majority via ActBlue. We need all hands on deck in order to FLIP THE SENATE and return the United States Senate to Republican control during the 2022 elections. Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Friend, we have a quick but urgent request: [**will you chip in to help protect Young Kim 's seat in Congress?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ckqu_x4Ns7VnF-b8_5RGRA0EajG6CowX9UFF4fR6PWq7B6Q1eJxxnnuXmKRkDH0YUbY_yHvq8RFHbdMtafPf6Vt_iKNiLpi5z5HRIIrpMuqtkhlC-rR3p-9EyyPjgsJQOP2TxT-FIQhXjlHBXp5WfGzwoHvSwWTv2Uzzw0Vkwc1SM7VvXOv43-Hs1j_F6xpAmLERccwJVE8Kz834jpHlXv5VeIBiYyChiRadGgfB7RzXySEw0Rf_utdoNQllRkDy87nniNXrty24DiLG7gszEN6q48jY0GciCxkoQJ0y62KAgbnCENeiW_HuBCWn2IEaXvkCNYByEPrzb0_LnCDCvPwb_Wzt8lbBaZnB4J44HIZIQjSRCvaKuOf8fxvHrlLj6hqx4ORzIpNsoa3fGJ1SLXcAb3CJtW5qyA29TVTi8maU13f5qzFPiCGWWIV98_lTlTM3uHYRlQI=&c=xpq6DPa80p5PzHbl8JneV0mbgbeiag0VRd_dF192iUZk0IIOT0AxZg==&ch=LWxaxD6U21ewfF_G6K15MgyaVQEMCYlcAdYBGuJOkW-DBgv_xbpAiQ==) **** House Democrats' campaign arm announced their top Republican targets, and Young Kim is one of them! name: Bobby Jindal
subject: This isn't your parents' Democratic Party
body:
Joe Biden projects a calm, moderate demeanor. He is aided by a lifetime spent in Washington, an acquiescent media, and the marked contrast with Donald [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2f19c6c407d7432c847fb97030649faf&_e=Qekps1q5q_Bj0_QSGG9gHjc-ngbHjx5-xbPp2799ERG4t0086wFmvMzsUgu-9RcQTiky_e56_zXn7kMce_1j3KgWXweWyO3AV8wq1gfRUsdrPeuCfZGqaByAXK4HL40Ee04jIn_CTpvSw9pE1GS37rgtidRvlq0yxYPzbih4-JogOPg2PttLOHv8Okt4Wl9FcC16iexUiIG1SoBajfTX4k98emCZlSrZ11l-6vNxxpY7MNXR0ZwkSVqEDTiYIrzfDOI1EMJnKXB_PWajgTem2g%3D%3D) | |
---
**This isn't your parents' Democratic Party**

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
Joe Biden projects a calm, moderate demeanor. He is aided by a lifetime spent in Washington, an acquiescent media, and the marked contrast with Donald Trump’s volatility.

While Trump’s outsize personality attracted constant media attention and caused his critics and admirers to overestimate the significance of his policies, Biden's aides have adopted an intentionally understated approach designed to induce complacency. Bill Clinton negotiated with congressional Republicans to enact many of his most important domestic bills, triangulating between the two parties to find a third way. Barack Obama resorted to executive actions and largely failed to pass major legislation after he lost control of Congress.

Biden’s apparent takeaway from his predecessors is that Democrats were not aggressive enough at the beginning of their terms when they had the majority and the political capital to enact their agenda. He is determined not to repeat that mistake, and the result is aggressive liberalism playing offense. A more confident conservatism, building on its domestic economic and foreign policy successes in the 1980s, continued to exert its influence even when Democrats occupied the White House. Bill Clinton famously declared, "The era of big government is over," recalling Reagan’s declaration, "The nine most terrifying words in the English language are: I'm from the government, and I’m here to help." Clinton negotiated and signed the Balanced Budget Act of 1997, which included reductions in Medicare’s growth rate and amended Medicaid to allow lower provider rates.

Even Obama felt the need to include reductions in Medicare rates to partially offset spending in the Affordable Care Act, and negotiated the Budget Control Act, and its caps on spending and automatic sequestration cuts, after he lost his congressional majorities. Whereas the BBA, along with the dot-com bubble, helped produce temporary federal budget surpluses, today's Democrats recently enacted a $1.9 trillion COVID relief bill and routinely ignore pay-as-you-go rules.

_Read the full article[**HERE**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2f19c6c407d7432c847fb97030649faf&_e=Qekps1q5q_Bj0_QSGG9gHjW0k70P_Ufq4HfXAvvoruwkyJMao_0nTkRcpd4St-RqVDkPppEVXTfRpXZuJJcPe1mgQhmG0V4UMLGZ0Sh-uooeiKZVHg_n3VzhFItMTDxywE_wczCXSfp0mI4J-6oGTE7tmFYIHdNQZk16PyotsSaYwsWQRSyuhzqG4igQ4ROmyrVrDS3dQENsw56Eh_Z5J9omCa-4U9oWXdQvkfBDQET_kywYBaWpS-g0hBS8k6lH6lBc0-qUObhPW3HQ9Hk9pPgIz8fZOXJVD1k0PVgov-ZT33G5nY9AfCAfc6PqOoh7FpikPmFjmwVqqIUrJ5KP0A%3D%3D)._

|
---

name: Ibraheem Samirah
subject: The future of marijuana in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
Virginia took a massive step forward when we became the first state in the South to legalize marijuana -- and I am beyond proud of the progress we’ve made so far. But the work is far from over....

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27954850/281705258/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjlhNjkzOS0wOWEyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zrzVYO_YscrmMnGWAC2bFdsMXfa7aEczX7elaB0IMe8=) Derek, Virginia took a massive step forward when we became the first state in the South to legalize marijuana -- and I am beyond proud of the progress we’ve made so far. **But the work is far from over.** If we continue to move forward without taking bold measures towards equitable legalization, we face the threat of big, established corporations stepping in and barring any entrance from the smaller businesses that have been trying to operate in the medicinal cannabis industry from taking advantage of full legalization. If we want to achieve true social and economic justice, we must create a cannabis industry that prioritizes those in communities of color and promotes Virginia growers, manufacturers, and dispensaries in all corners of the state so that we ensure the end of this prohibition is the start of a new era of equity. Virginia is in a unique position to succeed when it comes to ending the prohibition on marijuana -- not only does the Commonwealth have the ability to grow cannabis, we also have an abundance of resources to help manufacture products for consumption as well. But, if we don’t move quickly and with purpose, we risk the cannabis industry being overtaken by a few conglomerates similar to how we’ve seen Big Tobacco monopolize that particular market to the detriment of all of us. **This moment is a critical one -- and we can’t afford to get this wrong.** I’m working tirelessly in Richmond fighting to ensure the revenue streams from taxation of this industry ultimately go back into investing in Black and Brown communities, who are most negatively impacted by the prohibition of cannabis and mass incarceration perpetuated by nonviolent, small possession charges. We’ve shown that, together, we can accomplish great things but if we let our foot off the gas pedal now we risk going backward. At this moment, we must remain vigilant and keep fighting to ensure that a new era of equity descends on the Commonwealth. Thank you for reading,
Delegate Ibraheem Samirah | Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27954851/281705259/-1881050197?refcode=210420_justice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjlhNjkzOS0wOWEyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zrzVYO_YscrmMnGWAC2bFdsMXfa7aEczX7elaB0IMe8=)
---

Herndon, VA 20172

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wsXJkaAr4cU_-kW8JPELfyqj0LtuY5Ca6jzGsStbNMeyL9uMyQOb8tB4tUi44dZNfY4TbprcbmYZ35iE6xWZVf3ENJ9lVkHSvqeg5iBB-edebkOyGZfcj667qD94dL1D5jR2x307sos=&c=0o50yJus-Rj0dyAYgB8_xaEd3zr3r7EGtPqb-5oh-ACT74XQNEKSig==&ch=JHNLmEAyGLY7r1fZxVc9fNfGITtP9kYJS93pacbYFWRbGy2DfuidwQ==).

body:
****
Their hypocrisy knows no bounds.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9436802/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk0MzY4MDI%3d&x=dcc57982)************
Friend,

Woke, virtue-signaling politicians and organizations are doing everything they can to protest election security bills across the country, including pressuring the MLB to pull the All-Star game from Atlanta. Meanwhile, these same woke liberals have nothing to say about sending U.S. athletes to the Beijing Olympics next year, where China is known for human rights abuses (and there aren't even elections under Communist rule!) [**This is just further proof of the Left 's hypocrisy and their commitment to doing whatever it takes to block efforts that make it easier to vote and harder to cheat. We cannot let them continue to kneecap businesses and destroy our elections.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9436802/224717773/198390/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5ae1dd37)

****
The MLB, woke politicians, and liberal groups that do business with China have no problem with their Communism, their human rights abuses, or their assaults on democracy in Hong Kong. But they do have a problem with GOP-led efforts to secure our elections.

Hypocrisy is not exactly unbeknownst to the Democrat party, but this is absurd. Their "voter suppression" lies and boycotts are hurting real Americans' pocketbooks and their faith in our elections. We must move _forward_ with election security, not _backward_ :

[**Friend, please add your name to help State Republicans secure our elections and stop the lies:**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9436802/224717773/198390/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=c931efbf)

****

| | Friend - _**"**[T]he John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is essential to the protection of democracy.... It is my profound hope we will honor the legacy of my late friend Congressman John Lewis and the lives of those lost in the fight for a more perfect union by enacting this critical legislation into law."_ _\--Fair Fight Action Founder Stacey Abrams_’ _Testimony before the United States Senate on April 20, 2021_ Earlier today, Fair Fight Action’s Founder Stacey Abrams testified before the United States Senate Judiciary Committee on voter suppression in Georgia and across the country and the need for federal voter protection legislation. During the hearing, Georgia U.S. Senator Jon Ossoff introduced Fair Fight Action’s new groundbreaking report, _Georgia's Enduring Racial Discrimination in Voting and the Urgent Need to Modernize the Voting Rights Act_ , into the congressional record. Leader Abrams’ testimony and Fair Fight Action’s report establish why federal voting rights legislation is so important and why Georgia must be subject to federal oversight once more. You can watch the entire Senate Judiciary Committee hearing including Leader Abrams’ testimony and read FFA’s report, published this morning, **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27957099/281713724/748441493?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQxMDkyMS0xMGEyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqwqEDWUrpk9CUlhcV0C7E_3BEBEW1COMcRL7uI6hU4=&emci=d256b5e8-dea1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e0d10921-10a2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1037277)**. The hearing and the introduction of our report into the congressional record also mark the launch of an exciting new chapter in Fair Fight Action’s fight for voting rights: a National Voting Story Collection campaign! So far this year, 47 state legislatures have introduced at least 361 bills that would make it harder to vote. In response, Fair Fight Action is launching **[MyVotingStory.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27957100/281713725/1613923419?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQxMDkyMS0xMGEyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqwqEDWUrpk9CUlhcV0C7E_3BEBEW1COMcRL7uI6hU4=&emci=d256b5e8-dea1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e0d10921-10a2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1037277) ** and will be reaching out to voters in states across the country to document the obstacles they have faced while voting. Through voters’ stories, Fair Fight Action and our partners will demonstrate to Congress the urgent need for enhanced federal voting protections to ensure all eligible voters are able to cast their vote freely and make their voices heard, like those proposed in the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the For the People Act. **We look forward to your continued support -- the fight for voting rights is only heating up, and we urgently need your help. Friend,
Voters are now heading to the polls in the Texas Special Election, and our Conservative candidate, Jake Ellzey, continues to gain momentum -- _**but we need your help if we want to win this race and keep Texas RED.**_
[**Can we count on you to make a contribution of just $5 or $10 bucks by midnight tonight to help us across the finish line?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yat-OKXhklgXJh7KiDOdBpzYV1uRHXtdlZ6pEEco-BjyD1Eyc41koY7ihEvJLsI9EuXnV0Go-WgiZ9-9axbp0LvIrY43nzbFYXITSSGnHW8Zhx7QDeLvRVLv5-pWhLn3UqDBaBBxxX0GDnAHV22AKbtSc-FrzH2nfr1mPpMKbzmiabS6tOlR4l21AgQL-uKPct0mkXw992eVQDBW70vZrtKf8dCJa4_coKfDwE3rXIfteRAGTx200QLDw848xVL5lizYIZLRWlUh_73hqRp0nRdPCPLFaezgyjVprvPR_lFU4Y31ULnIjaW1wDtW3AAGHrd136M4Egnmwj5KWuaRDVqJWYsDz18cRNQQxrdNwatoxOd7MG3ldIqVCbFnbSvAetRO0Yq8TpwAetkAgQ7OkI2Li_qp9uS6uyvKSjHX2Kv2cqKVR9anddx74vI_70NGxzSkLJmG-ej6NAWaPJluSQ==&c=FBKR61MkofWlRa-i9-j5fMI6olrtlTbD4Ucy_FHBc6lRGQrPaCYJTg==&ch=wjWn7JQsDRmmCCmmV0ECuI5aOrEhTbVrmrx4byMkq8QfC6_L5M4l4w==)
We've received a tremendous amount of grassroots support from **over 10,000 conservatives** -- but with votes now actually being cast, we can't let up.
This race will decide the future of Congress. Either we win and begin Nancy Pelosi's retirement... OR we come up short and Biden and the far-left will cement their control of Washington and crush us with their radical agenda.
**Friend, this is a MUST WIN race.**

name: Matt Gaetz (Personal)
subject: It’s now racist to put America first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QBm4N0BLOQMG1bNAF0YLjfHX52HZ5ZhafIb8_4QebgL8evgAMPjpTtR8gZQ2M1C2CMykkuCOdpJ-WFBYpNCTyhJmSn6nEjYwxcg8MqDV2vW8ORnfO7-o72duzEukzvLJZ2IvOt5voD7DS8gfQJbFV2K_vkdhsYblNfyvPEN5HqiD6NDxk-_z1ayZRDYLd2zW&c=kAc4aoBYJbqGvMIutYmk-nWPNEaBy4H5sJrqscA9NetMfknk1wFVCg==&ch=LamNM0LN-bUwFBItBYAVyfotAVVFoc2uQeoMnxVL4jjn7nCMtQvSug==&jrc=1)
---
| Peter,
Is it racist to put America first? Is it racist to want all Americans, despite their ethnicity, color, background, or religion, to have equal opportunities to pursue life, liberty, and happiness?
According to the Establishment and their allies in the media...it is!
President Trump dared to take on the DC Swamp that consistently put America last, and I will proudly follow in his footsteps to fight for a country that puts its citizens first - no matter who you are or where you come from.
That is the ideal our country should strive for...and what millions of people in the Silent Majority are begging of their leaders.
I will be that leader. Unlike other weak-kneed politicians, I am not afraid to stand up to the Establishment that sends jobs overseas, opens the border to millions of undocumented immigrants and unaccompanied minors, sends our tax money to failed states across the world, and looks down on Middle America just for asking for a fair shake.
You can join me in my mission to put America first here:
[Donate now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QBm4N0BLOQMG1bNAF0YLjfHX52HZ5ZhafIb8_4QebgL8evgAMPjpTtR8gZQ2M1C2CMykkuCOdpJ-WFBYpNCTyhJmSn6nEjYwxcg8MqDV2vW8ORnfO7-o72duzEukzvLJZ2IvOt5voD7DS8gfQJbFV2K_vkdhsYblNfyvPEN5HqiD6NDxk-_z1ayZRDYLd2zW&c=kAc4aoBYJbqGvMIutYmk-nWPNEaBy4H5sJrqscA9NetMfknk1wFVCg==&ch=LamNM0LN-bUwFBItBYAVyfotAVVFoc2uQeoMnxVL4jjn7nCMtQvSug==&jrc=1)
It's time, once and for all, to stand up for the American people. I'm ready to do it. Are you?
Click here to donate $25 for America-First leaders:
[Donate $25 to put America first >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QBm4N0BLOQMG1bNAF0YLjfHX52HZ5ZhafIb8_4QebgL8evgAMPjpTtR8gZQ2M1C2Di63-hevULFD0xoB1gL2F1EMYAio8Y0-1Z0AAIpZvSatfqQYDdJb2s4semY13f4fdxEmWnhNEEuNioU6xu7kmkMXSmotaq2aMbD5AYzqk8diRFc_eVk_ZGrVDRNs_mD1mXixVORJkBo=&c=kAc4aoBYJbqGvMIutYmk-nWPNEaBy4H5sJrqscA9NetMfknk1wFVCg==&ch=LamNM0LN-bUwFBItBYAVyfotAVVFoc2uQeoMnxVL4jjn7nCMtQvSug==&jrc=1)
I appreciate your time and support,
-Matt Gaetz

body:
We need to use every resource available to win back our Conservative House majority and restore commonsense back to Washington. Without it, America is approaching slippery territory with the Left in charge.
**⚠ ️⚠️ BREAKING ⚠️⚠️**

**First** , House Dems renewed their effort to defund the police with Rep. Rashida Tlaib's calls for "no more policing".

**Then** , Democrats announced their attempts to use the Presidency to bypass Congress and force sweeping restrictions on gun ownership without solving any actual problems.

**Now** , prominent House Democrat, Maxine Waters, told protesters in Minneapolis to "get more confrontational" this past weekend. As if the city was not already on the edge of erupting in violence once again.

The Left is **following through with their pledges to enact radical change for Americans** , **but to do it they are encouraging unwanted violence in Minneapolis.**

**HELP STOP THE RADICAL LEFT**

Friend, we need to use every resource available to win back our Conservative House majority and restore commonsense back to Washington. Without it, America is approaching slippery territory with the Left in charge.

With control over the House of Representatives, the Senate, and the Presidency, these Radical Democrats have proven they will stop at nothing to leave their mark on every piece of American society, no matter what destruction their changes bring.

**FIRE PELOSI >> RETAKE THE HOUSE**

The future of the United States of America is at stake. We can't do this alone--**Will you help us TAKE BACK THE HOUSE?**

With gratitude,
Team Luetkemeyer (via House Conservatives)

subject: Biden’s New Tax Hike Plan
body:
Infrastructure Plan gone wrong
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WuBPb2K4ZO6dE6T2SmI4mg6cnXB0eroJYYpKt23sRtouS_0oVRCGvNOFIU06SFvsw4zR9CEGu3nfD1kzDk-tWWtc9Owk3svPdzIPfkFbGohgq2UsP4Rl_8KkcgGa3zSC28DsrqC6gg19qRRM_edYScyHavjaAN_DtuMHf_n7NbnBxm51M6fF4GnKMcKxgkn1&c=8Ui76qMiVfnAVmwd7dieVmBmgw8txsXOD5gQi75Fa-80EW6aTrXaUQ==&ch=8cJtwjgOge5T7Ivt9jhWAAdb8TteLecg0l3rbx5TsLvy-7Y1OnOwSg==&jrc=1)

| Patriot,
Did you hear about the Biden administration's new proposal to raise our taxes?
Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg recently hinted at a vehicle mileage tax to help pay for Biden's "infrastructure" bill. Biden also mentioned raising the federal income tax to fund this project.
That's right - that would mean YOU would be footing the bill for Biden's $2 TRILLION DOLLAR price tag.

name: Trump Alert (via NRSC)
subject: Trump is BACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Let's face facts--the Democrats are out-fundraising and out-performing us right now.

**We lost control of the Senate and now we each get a front row seat to the destruction of President Trump 's legacy.**

Now more than ever, President Trump needs to see Americans stand with him, back him and support our America First movement. Patriots like you made this movement possible just five years ago--**and now its future rests in your hands!**

**[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkhZKfneQ11WDzLOxnh2lYzd1YFfKX4Ruf_cmJ7cARaXxOQnSkWhbWUbHZzYPN-QW-XSJp8zwBI84u1oJNZ_LxCHAAkvW2gC3H_idEJjIuDbQkDk8ETW51qYyOz3WpCVKjqAdUTokp_fTxFQWLdHYmd0BtbCN-SoT_rpINXGyhAczmMcqI2_Sac4iKR_mjleYFwbQCKD7pT7R_1AFx1aofwoCqBn5soqlExypgxCZB0yIWysUNLeRrCIiW700t_1Igz4sjGmWFA6wgsPB6wMApaeQ7p7VXsNu5wU3nFUvbdDjUQxb9HhLeOriqhnZZRfj2mhfoCxkElAo8U6GL0LUvjI6iQX70ntBWfvshRYK5Yj_XUJX5_Ev4r8Duq2AiyfI1_PK2Z97aS1U1rC0st6V64ANeU6Cg_JaTb9fQIVQlA=&c=gtc2ct6KYUCp5FOinkqatQNik7Rb9zKDj72xTDoL89sUnoaprjufbA==&ch=zQZ3ZMQL0uHTX4-AWA_21lZhUf473NAxZ-cV0T1YWfTJuUoCZ3vdng==)**
---

**In order to keep the America First movement alive for President Trump, we only need to win back ONE seat in the Senate.** But if we can't even do that, Republicans are guaranteed to lose four years of progress on the issues we all care about--**and if we can 't take back the Senate, the damage is certain to be irreversible.**
_****_
**[**STAND WITH TRUMP AND RETAKE THE SENATE MAJORITY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkhZKfneQ11WDzLOxnh2lYzd1YFfKX4Ruf_cmJ7cARaXxOQnSkWhbWUbHZzYPN-QW-XSJp8zwBI84u1oJNZ_LxCHAAkvW2gC3H_idEJjIuDbQkDk8ETW51qYyOz3WpCVKjqAdUTokp_fTxFQWLdHYmd0BtbCN-SoT_rpINXGyhAczmMcqI2_Sac4iKR_mjleYFwbQCKD7pT7R_1AFx1aofwoCqBn5soqlExypgxCZB0yIWysUNLeRrCIiW700t_1Igz4sjGmWFA6wgsPB6wMApaeQ7p7VXsNu5wU3nFUvbdDjUQxb9HhLeOriqhnZZRfj2mhfoCxkElAo8U6GL0LUvjI6iQX70ntBWfvshRYK5Yj_XUJX5_Ev4r8Duq2AiyfI1_PK2Z97aS1U1rC0st6V64ANeU6Cg_JaTb9fQIVQlA=&c=gtc2ct6KYUCp5FOinkqatQNik7Rb9zKDj72xTDoL89sUnoaprjufbA==&ch=zQZ3ZMQL0uHTX4-AWA_21lZhUf473NAxZ-cV0T1YWfTJuUoCZ3vdng==)**
---
_****_
Thank you patriot,

NRSC HQ

clean_body: Join our fight to stand up to Biden and the left! == Did you hear the news, Friend? At Governor Reynolds' direction, the State of Iowa has joined 12 other states in suing the Biden Administration for what she believes is an unconstitutional provision within Biden's stimulus bill that bars states from cutting taxes. In 2018, Governor Reynolds signed into law historic tax cuts that will soon save the average family of four $1,000 a year. She's trying to do even more but provisions with Joe Biden's COVID relief bill might get in the way! The Biden-Harris Administration is FORCING Iowans to pay for the multi-trillion dollar covid relief bill that bails out blue states like California and New York. Meanwhile, Radical Democrats across the country are still trying to keep Republican states like Iowa shut down. Liberal leadership is failing the American people and that is why conservative Governors like Kim Reynolds are standing up to fight back. == == **== Governor Reynolds is fighting back to protect historic tax cuts we passed in 2018 and also make sure that hard-working Americans are not forced to foot the bill for Democrats' radical wishlist. == == == == == President Biden is pushing a radical left agenda that will only harm the freedoms of hard-working Americans. It is time that we say enough is enough. Thank you for joining our fight, Team Reynolds == Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! body:
We MUST elect America First Republicans committed to restoring election integrity, and we can't do that without your support.

****
Hey, Fellow Conservative. Kelly Loeffler here.

I need to talk to you about what's happening in my home state of Georgia. I know this email is long, but this issue is important to me and to millions of hardworking Americans, so I hope you'll take a moment to read it to the end...

Right now, Democrat Stacey Abrams is relentlessly attacking my efforts to bring back confidence in Georgia's elections. She's told the mainstream media we're engaging in conspiracy theories and she's painted conservatives as being against voting rights.

_That couldn 't be further from the truth._

**What 's worse?** Woke mob corporations and cancel culture lunatics are trying to drive business out of Georgia, killing family-owned small businesses and destroying our local economy... all because conservatives are trying to ensure our elections remain FAIR and FREE.

It's painfully obvious there's a nationwide distrust in our entire voting system, and rightfully so! That's why I'm working my hardest EVERY SINGLE DAY to strengthen election integrity and expand voting access for ALL Americans, starting here in my home state of Georgia!

[**But Fellow Conservative, I can 't win this fight alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-byFI9VpehT3hoNhmuWEv-6yJgj5a0G4abUiHzGi6HdMCLzH2-JSiyNIY_n0xkawbnGlshEAnsakg53VW6QoVlHzrOXH6FzzJYrvIo4QxStJLo57STFaMd4W8pgYcd4lxIOlBQQpFGVnp3lDPA1widBYnS3NHhIjRwzzZFyibu0pa0z9XL0kPsr54l613U-zsJZGuy8o74ITm7cvAqayKsbVgKs7eA4l99JVW0d8-oJCwYTLLW5TEIr7f_BehAMd4AQZ12rEKrgMEwYpYFyaN8bPBywxyVGGfsFv4U4uP8F7Ou25uB7_slZAYFP34y3uy6slGPY_UwhJBPSlMLSYJrhhUnhaaPW5UZNSoVMuBd0UjQMOV1LCfwuMWNDFK8NsvEB5nC9sqU4gA1jhJ20fWCbGRghRDugM2e2EpG6sav_6sG1p5LkW_MJEuCm8IxUm&c=PuR2-OG1pq80ety9L15pNV3Xbv1rLmriZEovS6o1xOUfxjRv4JD9QA==&ch=trzoNUvZ9LnzjHTpwrADDmFFkqxSke2bg-NAEgVdU19cThUnNiw_Dg==) Not with the National Democrats and the Fake News media coming after me.

_It comes down to YOU!_ Unless we take back the House and restore common-sense conservative leadership in Washington, the Democrats will continue to undermine us and erase any and all conservative achievements made in the last four years under President Trump's leadership. And, we can't take back the House without your support.

[**House conservatives are fighting to restore integrity and fairness in our elections ... will you take a stand and join them, Fellow Conservative? Failing to act gives the Democrats yet another advantage in rigging our elections.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-byFI9VpehT3hoNhmuWEv-6yJgj5a0G4abUiHzGi6HdMCLzH2-JSiyNIY_n0xkawbnGlshEAnsakg53VW6QoVlHzrOXH6FzzJYrvIo4QxStJLo57STFaMd4W8pgYcd4lxIOlBQQpFGVnp3lDPA1widBYnS3NHhIjRwzzZFyibu0pa0z9XL0kPsr54l613U-zsJZGuy8o74ITm7cvAqayKsbVgKs7eA4l99JVW0d8-oJCwYTLLW5TEIr7f_BehAMd4AQZ12rEKrgMEwYpYFyaN8bPBywxyVGGfsFv4U4uP8F7Ou25uB7_slZAYFP34y3uy6slGPY_UwhJBPSlMLSYJrhhUnhaaPW5UZNSoVMuBd0UjQMOV1LCfwuMWNDFK8NsvEB5nC9sqU4gA1jhJ20fWCbGRghRDugM2e2EpG6sav_6sG1p5LkW_MJEuCm8IxUm&c=PuR2-OG1pq80ety9L15pNV3Xbv1rLmriZEovS6o1xOUfxjRv4JD9QA==&ch=trzoNUvZ9LnzjHTpwrADDmFFkqxSke2bg-NAEgVdU19cThUnNiw_Dg==)

[**HELP SECURE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-byFI9VpehT3hoNhmuWEv-6yJgj5a0G4abUiHzGi6HdMCLzH2-JSiyNIY_n0xkawbnGlshEAnsakg53VW6QoVlHzrOXH6FzzJYrvIo4QxStJLo57STFaMd4W8pgYcd4lxIOlBQQpFGVnp3lDPA1widBYnS3NHhIjRwzzZFyibu0pa0z9XL0kPsr54l613U-zsJZGuy8o74ITm7cvAqayKsbVgKs7eA4l99JVW0d8-oJCwYTLLW5TEIr7f_BehAMd4AQZ12rEKrgMEwYpYFyaN8bPBywxyVGGfsFv4U4uP8F7Ou25uB7_slZAYFP34y3uy6slGPY_UwhJBPSlMLSYJrhhUnhaaPW5UZNSoVMuBd0UjQMOV1LCfwuMWNDFK8NsvEB5nC9sqU4gA1jhJ20fWCbGRghRDugM2e2EpG6sav_6sG1p5LkW_MJEuCm8IxUm&c=PuR2-OG1pq80ety9L15pNV3Xbv1rLmriZEovS6o1xOUfxjRv4JD9QA==&ch=trzoNUvZ9LnzjHTpwrADDmFFkqxSke2bg-NAEgVdU19cThUnNiw_Dg==)
_**
Your Gift=5x Matched Until Midnight!**_

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-byFI9VpehT3hoNhmuWEv-6yJgj5a0G4abUiHzGi6HdMCLzH2-JSiyNIY_n0xkawbnGlshEAnsakg53VW6QoVlHzrOXH6FzzJYrvIo4QxStJLo57STFaMd4W8pgYcd4lxIOlBQQpFGVnp3lDPA1widBYnS3NHhIjRwzzZFyibu0pa0z9XL0kPsr54l613U-zsJZGuy8o74ITm7cvAqayKsbVgKs7eA4l99JVW0d8-oJCwYTLLW5TEIr7f_BehAMd4AQZ12rEKrgMEwYpYFyaN8bPBywxyVGGfsFv4U4uP8F7Ou25uB7_slZAYFP34y3uy6slGPY_UwhJBPSlMLSYJrhhUnhaaPW5UZNSoVMuBd0UjQMOV1LCfwuMWNDFK8NsvEB5nC9sqU4gA1jhJ20fWCbGRghRDugM2e2EpG6sav_6sG1p5LkW_MJEuCm8IxUm&c=PuR2-OG1pq80ety9L15pNV3Xbv1rLmriZEovS6o1xOUfxjRv4JD9QA==&ch=trzoNUvZ9LnzjHTpwrADDmFFkqxSke2bg-NAEgVdU19cThUnNiw_Dg==)

America's confidence in our elections is ERODING with each and every election, in no small part because of the radical actions taken by Nancy Pelosi and her allies in the Fake News Media and Big Tech to undermine election integrity. _They 're working to ABOLISH voter I.D. laws because apparently it's more important to protect tickets to a ball game than to protect American Democracy._

It's clear: **We MUST elect America First Republicans committed to restoring election integrity, and we can 't do that without your support.**

Nancy Pelosi knows that the only way she can maintain her razor-thin liberal majority in the House is if she can rig elections in her favor and slowly crumble America's trust in our democratic system.

She'll do ANYTHING to keep her grip on power...even if that means compromising democracy. As a proud American, I know you'll agree with me when I say: **That 's 100% unacceptable.**

**The only way to put a stop to Pelosi 's dangerous game is by electing conservatives to the House who'll fight to restore our country's election integrity. And as I said before, [I can't do that without your support.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-byFI9VpehT3hoNhmuWEv-6yJgj5a0G4abUiHzGi6HdMCLzH2-JSiyNIY_n0xkawbnGlshEAnsakg53VW6QoVlHzrOXH6FzzJYrvIo4QxStJLo57STFaMd4W8pgYcd4lxIOlBQQpFGVnp3lDPA1widBYnS3NHhIjRwzzZFyibu0pa0z9XL0kPsr54l613U-zsJZGuy8o74ITm7cvAqayKsbVgKs7eA4l99JVW0d8-oJCwYTLLW5TEIr7f_BehAMd4AQZ12rEKrgMEwYpYFyaN8bPBywxyVGGfsFv4U4uP8F7Ou25uB7_slZAYFP34y3uy6slGPY_UwhJBPSlMLSYJrhhUnhaaPW5UZNSoVMuBd0UjQMOV1LCfwuMWNDFK8NsvEB5nC9sqU4gA1jhJ20fWCbGRghRDugM2e2EpG6sav_6sG1p5LkW_MJEuCm8IxUm&c=PuR2-OG1pq80ety9L15pNV3Xbv1rLmriZEovS6o1xOUfxjRv4JD9QA==&ch=trzoNUvZ9LnzjHTpwrADDmFFkqxSke2bg-NAEgVdU19cThUnNiw_Dg==)**

I hope that I can count on you to join me in this fight for the soul of our nation, Fellow Conservative.

Sincerely,

clean_body: We MUST elect America First Republicans committed to restoring election integrity, and we can't do that without your support. ** Hey, Fellow Conservative. Kelly Loeffler here. I need to talk to you about what's happening in my home state of Georgia. I know this email is long, but this issue is important to me and to millions of hardworking Americans, so I hope you'll take a moment to read it to the end... Right now, Democrat Stacey Abrams is relentlessly attacking my efforts to bring back confidence in Georgia's elections. She's told the mainstream media we're engaging in conspiracy theories and she's painted conservatives as being against voting rights. That couldn 't be further from the truth. What 's worse? Woke mob corporations and cancel culture lunatics are trying to drive business out of Georgia, killing family-owned small businesses and destroying our local economy... all because conservatives are trying to ensure our elections remain FAIR and FREE. It's painfully obvious there's a nationwide distrust in our entire voting system, and rightfully so! That's why I'm working my hardest EVERY SINGLE DAY to strengthen election integrity and expand voting access for ALL Americans, starting here in my home state of Georgia! == Not with the National Democrats and the Fake News media coming after me. It comes down to YOU! Unless we take back the House and restore common-sense conservative leadership in Washington, the Democrats will continue to undermine us and erase any and all conservative achievements made in the last four years under President Trump's leadership. And, we can't take back the House without your support. == == Your Gift=5x Matched Until Midnight! == America's confidence in our elections is ERODING with each and every election, in no small part because of the radical actions taken by Nancy Pelosi and her allies in the Fake News Media and Big Tech to undermine election integrity. They 're working to ABOLISH voter I.D. laws because apparently it's more important to protect tickets to a ball game than to protect American Democracy. It's clear: We MUST elect America First Republicans committed to restoring election integrity, and we can 't do that without your support. Nancy Pelosi knows that the only way she can maintain her razor-thin liberal majority in the House is if she can rig elections in her favor and slowly crumble America's trust in our democratic system. She'll do ANYTHING to keep her grip on power...even if that means compromising democracy. As a proud American, I know you'll agree with me when I say: That 's 100% unacceptable. The only way to put a stop to Pelosi 's dangerous game is by electing conservatives to the House who'll fight to restore our country's election integrity. And as I said before, == I hope that I can count on you to join me in this fight for the soul of our nation, Fellow Conservative. Sincerely, Sen. Kelly Loeffler Georgia Republican == == Your Gift=5x Matched Until Midnight! == Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). **The Democrats have always talked about packing the Supreme court with far-left judges,_but now they 're actually going to do it._**

I need your help to stop them immediately. [_**Can I count on you to sign our petition telling Biden HANDS OFF THE SUPREME COURT?**_](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9438385/224717773/198420/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=4510ab1a) [_**SIGN YOUR NAME >>> Tell the left HANDS OFF the Court!**_](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9438385/224717773/198420/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=d2c57b7b) Liberals are bending the rules so they can make sure their socialist agenda hits no roadblocks. We MUST work together to protect the conservative majority that we have worked so hard to build in the Supreme Court.

Having a Democrat majority in the Supreme Court is downright dangerous, _and you can be sure their first move would be overturning important precedents like Roe v. Wade._

The future of our country is at stake here, friend. [_**Can we count on you to help us block the Biden Administration from taking this unprecedented power grab?**_](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9438385/224717773/198420/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5dc170bc) [HANDS OFF THE SUPREME COURT](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9438385/224717773/198420/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=d34e02ca) _****_ Thank you,

Peter,

We’re going to send this report card to Nancy Pelosi and let her know how the people of New York feel about her ‘leadership.’ But before we do, Andrew wanted us to get feedback from supporters like you.

**Here are the facts about Pelosi’s ‘Leadership’:**

_**FIRST,**_ she politicized the pandemic and didn’t deliver relief to struggling small businesses until it was already too late.

_**THEN,**_ she emboldened her party’s socialist wing and let them set Democrats’ new radical agenda in Congress.

_**NOW,**_ she is pushing things like H.R. 1, which would mean a complete federal takeover over of state elections and give Democrats a permanent advantage.

**That deserves an ‘ F’ from us, but we want to get your opinion before sending this over tomorrow. **

name: Marco Rubio
subject: This isn’t offered to everyone...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, It's Marco Rubio here and I wanted to follow up on the news from last week
|
---
| | | Friend,

It's Marco Rubio here and I wanted to follow up on the news from last week.

I was incredibly humbled and proud to have been endorsed by President Trump for re-election. I know it seems like the election is a while away but the battle for the Senate has already started and is proving to be tough.

It is for these exact reasons that we decided to reopen our Founding Member Campaign last week, **but we have only 52 spots left.**
---

I know that with the Trump Endorsement, I will be seeing more attacks from the Democrats. A pro-abortion group announced I've been put "on notice" almost immediately after the endorsement. Whether it be online, in the media, or even sending Kamala Harris to Florida, Democrats have already started laying the groundwork to defeat me.

This is what I am facing, Friend.

While it won't be easy, I am not going to bend to the whims of cancel culture and the woke liberal media. I believe that with Trump's Endorsement, my campaign is stronger, but it will energize the Democrats, too.

With all of that being said, I wanted to personally thank you for being one of my top supporters and ask if you would consider becoming a Founding Member of my campaign. I need more people like you, Friend, on my team. Your support makes my team that much stronger in the face of attacks by the Democrats.

We don't have an easy road ahead, Friend, but I know that I can do this with you on my team. Please join today, we only have a few spots left, and this will be one of the last times we make this offer.

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
