Peter,

I’m Senator Rick Scott from Florida - and for the next two years I have the honor of serving as the chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

In my job, I have one role: **[Take back the Senate from the far-Left Democrats and return some sanity to our country](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4df1729731114624a0daa0f71d9a6446&_e=JNHchhXVzL0GwKNIzwwZM8KO1NI3zqa54y5GpK9RSP-ICgJ4FSPZjjTzfn9nfvYwHBYNHrf7T5DwCKRjkzEbBnvJzM7in_79hDbd2RNpcGQcVIp1svMKQwfCo_mUQQxoqjaL_mgRCkOJOaGAD82P3-ignrN1lUxfvzz7jZ6mUJ6umax-wtywjROFeieToWNvPsneYfTkXor1mQoaylZAY2QaZMH1Kv-C_0QDkGypeX_mg5digoVtsfuiv6eo1ccIX3r1Pvg-Cdx7g4_ody9GsNzz2VGFUm_7Up3thUugUmMtHd0nvCQhyYuvRMCLOUtK3P8a0SYNeULSkQ8-Gtm1AyT91gEQnKqLtPr7223GSV7Vj1XZ6Cqx7GARVN4RJWcYBBG8h0Yzdg50vMehnaAILJTKcW4oQ00wAX8DU801dUWFeIzhP1ppQggTk96WpdZB6LYe7Mgs-I6J3dGDIf4LS-hcLpynGrqQ9v2zKMqXnSpYTuR5dChTqq8cAVAdXgts_fM9qSreJ-msBLC7phTcSoCSID1QHxvqmGZ3MHHeSPjZIKJATN91HQYVRyodpv4hQNFAiyzedsMXMEhw_dsOV6MhhmutS8ECcJNHzPFJ2tsni1rNAoau9YCQZje8N3Iuv3BMnpYL4hZnsjUA6K6u1XZBanLaSdurC3BhAXf2lNBWkeOtU1wxtpqTIEMVgqRmuBaLPKWoxYyqkpcDsPuqjsYjCSf_ST-ce7N7AOamIJY%3D)**.

I’m writing to you today to let you know about a conversation I recently had with former President Donald Trump. **My main takeaway from our meeting was how invested he is in seeing Republicans retake the Senate majority next year**.

**I told him that my team is working night and day to build the support we need to make it happen.**

**[That’s why before April 30th my team and I have set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to pledge their support to our efforts; taking back the Senate will be an “all hands-on deck” effort.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4df1729731114624a0daa0f71d9a6446&_e=JNHchhXVzL0GwKNIzwwZM8KO1NI3zqa54y5GpK9RSP-ICgJ4FSPZjjTzfn9nfvYwHBYNHrf7T5DwCKRjkzEbBnvJzM7in_79hDbd2RNpcGQcVIp1svMKQwfCo_mUQQxoqjaL_mgRCkOJOaGAD82P3-ignrN1lUxfvzz7jZ6mUJ6umax-wtywjROFeieToWNvPsneYfTkXor1mQoaylZAY2QaZMH1Kv-C_0QDkGypeX_mg5digoVtsfuiv6eo1ccIX3r1Pvg-Cdx7g4_ody9GsNzz2VGFUm_7Up3thUugUmMtHd0nvCQhyYuvRMCLOUtK3P8a0SYNeULSkQ8-Gtm1AyT91gEQnKqLtPr7223GSV7Vj1XZ6Cqx7GARVN4RJWcYBBG8h0Yzdg50vMehnaAILJTKcW4oQ00wAX8DU801dUWFeIzhP1ppQggTk96WpdZB6LYe7Mgs-I6J3dGDIf4LS-hcLpynGrqQ9v2zKMqXnSpYTuR5dChTqq8cAVAdXgtskpsEPNJU1sk6LYUYJhmCI70bQYexyP-IjMyU9JeQ81cklExqUYXZ9SxtnCgTvJRo7Y4NpB0D8ironpnZKmL_BLIdapF9I21bfaSdPxNF0QM9LRcBcCTFdndIIdlAoKuWLgNKHpK5psHqATta17eOAF6xW_0OGLDCW3DGeo3XIj9a6SUYZJVwgfdLZjnrBPtLu_6DtLmcEVnbIew6lYB5XoInzBrrULNsS1psukF7CF8%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4df1729731114624a0daa0f71d9a6446&_e=JNHchhXVzL0GwKNIzwwZM8KO1NI3zqa54y5GpK9RSP-ICgJ4FSPZjjTzfn9nfvYwHBYNHrf7T5DwCKRjkzEbBnvJzM7in_79hDbd2RNpcGQcVIp1svMKQwfCo_mUQQxoqjaL_mgRCkOJOaGAD82P3-ignrN1lUxfvzz7jZ6mUJ6umax-wtywjROFeieToWNvPsneYfTkXor1mQoaylZAY2QaZMH1Kv-C_0QDkGypeX_mg5digoVtsfuiv6eo1ccIX3r1Pvg-Cdx7g4_ody9GsNzz2VGFUm_7Up3thUugUmMtHd0nvCQhyYuvRMCLOUtK3P8a0SYNeULSkQ8-Gtm1AyT91gEQnKqLtPr7223GSV7Vj1XZ6Cqx7GARVN4RJWcYBBG8h0Yzdg50vMehnaAILJTKcW4oQ00wAX8DU801dUWFeIzhP1ppQggTk96WpdZB6LYe7Mgs-I6J3dGDIf4LS-hcLpynGrqQ9v2zKMqXnSpYTuR5dChTqq8cAVAdXgtsbCabnrHytNN2trPDXPVv4Tq1NwpF2e9qT7Ac69PK7nvdCxv-Wkl-oO6ILR15NF4Z96_4W2_X8bwMyiPR7768SyrzCCDxXiVM5gc0GE3eh-F6TnPerek_txat1uw320xPJqfWXpxg1Oin5rESkHsBWyHulcQwn9IUjp5KRMlq82VaH4BQe-e2u5AaAwbBWyE1inBEfzL5Dd_Xj25XlWFlbeC41GS4ETz03qONvjM7kaU%3D)
It’s going to be a monumental task – Democrats are going to fight like hell to hold onto their 50-50 Senate majority; **Chuck Schumer is going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to paint Republicans in the worst possible light.**

Democrats will lie about Republicans’ records of accomplishment and they will smear us every chance they get.

Think about what is at stake _IF_ Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year:
1. Democrats will kill the filibuster, if they don’t do it sooner;
2. They’ll spend trillions on pet projects that we will never be able to pay off
3. And Democrats will federalize elections; creating a permanent Democrat majority.

**Republicans only need a net gain of ONE seat to win back the majority to take away the tie-breaking vote from Kamala Harris in the evenly divided Senate.**

**Victory is within reach – but we will come up short if we don’t have the support of every conservative from across the country.**

I’m passionate about our shared conservative beliefs and **[I’m asking you to add your name to our petition today pledging your support to our cause.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4df1729731114624a0daa0f71d9a6446&_e=JNHchhXVzL0GwKNIzwwZM8KO1NI3zqa54y5GpK9RSP-ICgJ4FSPZjjTzfn9nfvYwHBYNHrf7T5DwCKRjkzEbBnvJzM7in_79hDbd2RNpcGQcVIp1svMKQwfCo_mUQQxoqjaL_mgRCkOJOaGAD82P3-ignrN1lUxfvzz7jZ6mUJ6umax-wtywjROFeieToWNvPsneYfTkXor1mQoaylZAY2QaZMH1Kv-C_0QDkGypeX_mg5digoVtsfuiv6eo1ccIX3r1Pvg-Cdx7g4_ody9GsNzz2VGFUm_7Up3thUugUmMtHd0nvCQhyYuvRMCLOUtK3P8a0SYNeULSkQ8-Gtm1AyT91gEQnKqLtPr7223GSV7Vj1XZ6Cqx7GARVN4RJWcYBBG8h0Yzdg50vMehnaAILJTKcW4oQ00wAX8DU801dUWFeIzhP1ppQggTk96WpdZB6LYe7Mgs-I6J3dGDIf4LS-hcLpynGrqQ9v2zKMqXnSpYTuR5dChTqq8cAVAdXgtsdfe44ndS6glcX9dWJj2PC-APCka9tFnd1XOz5t-Qr5IXLzBtU-qUJkbN9NsjUIsOC9c0V2gNPLVKg3Zzn5zjrz_wR3dusIuTDNMbAz7ZW7KkEhwuSoGpcv9LF6WNtGJ8XeR_iosVS0TzooSR3jxl2a7bG3wtpnS84oH7F4LMj7Q2OZWpWUADMx_TYT2unMd4kqwHMjhh_JzZRHCE4azNTHsKx2n32rsn2n0MQ9MelcE%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4df1729731114624a0daa0f71d9a6446&_e=JNHchhXVzL0GwKNIzwwZM8KO1NI3zqa54y5GpK9RSP-ICgJ4FSPZjjTzfn9nfvYwHBYNHrf7T5DwCKRjkzEbBnvJzM7in_79hDbd2RNpcGQcVIp1svMKQwfCo_mUQQxoqjaL_mgRCkOJOaGAD82P3-ignrN1lUxfvzz7jZ6mUJ6umax-wtywjROFeieToWNvPsneYfTkXor1mQoaylZAY2QaZMH1Kv-C_0QDkGypeX_mg5digoVtsfuiv6eo1ccIX3r1Pvg-Cdx7g4_ody9GsNzz2VGFUm_7Up3thUugUmMtHd0nvCQhyYuvRMCLOUtK3P8a0SYNeULSkQ8-Gtm1AyT91gEQnKqLtPr7223GSV7Vj1XZ6Cqx7GARVN4RJWcYBBG8h0Yzdg50vMehnaAILJTKcW4oQ00wAX8DU801dUWFeIzhP1ppQggTk96WpdZB6LYe7Mgs-I6J3dGDIf4LS-hcLpynGrqQ9v2zKMqXnSpYTuR5dChTqq8cAVAdXgtssDfrE3bryw11dROloUSVZQyDp0Jqo1ONVs9f10LzIfUFD3P4SMWTaiiLJVSpooOj2oT5ip0spEI3X7hq4vOlKBR674NdlvzuO49_IYU0fR6T2f4O4q_56q0UrUQQneUXw3ngQ4CISHH3-pEFDxUfrTU1bFs4bGend6jFRDhibPm45MDvDADGFbjGY0HCxfI9zicnvgMxbts1ro-cQrZvnhAB1BXIScXOQvZ8yZLKJes%3D)
President Trump and I are counting on you. The future of our Republic is at stake.

Let's get this done!
Senator Rick Scott (R-FL)
NRSC Chairman

TAKE BACK THE SENATE➔****](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4df1729731114624a0daa0f71d9a6446&_e=JNHchhXVzL0GwKNIzwwZM8KO1NI3zqa54y5GpK9RSP-ICgJ4FSPZjjTzfn9nfvYwHBYNHrf7T5DwCKRjkzEbBnvJzM7in_79hDbd2RNpcGQcVIp1svMKQwfCo_mUQQxoqjaL_mgRCkOJOaGAD82P3-ignrN1lUxfvzz7jZ6mUJ6umax-wtywjROFeieToWNvPsneYfTkXor1mQoaylZAY2QaZMH1Kv-C_0QDkGypeX_mg5digoVtsfuiv6eo1ccIX3r1Pvg-Cdx7g4_ody9GsNzz2VGFUm_7Up3thUugUmMtHd0nvCQhyYuvRMCLOUtK3P8a0SYNeULSkQ8-Gtm1AyT91gEQnKqLtPr7223GSV7Vj1XZ6Cqx7GARVN4RJWcYBBG8h0Yzdg50vMehnaAILJTKcW4oQ00wAX8DU801dUWFeIzhP1ppQggTk96WpdZB6LYe7Mgs-I6J3dGDIf4LS-hcLpynGrqQ9v2zKMqXnSpYTuR5dChTqq8cAVAdXgtsaxOigPPyjwvAWV_al0Q49xKGmEZHr5ROavShO7GYS6tGoE1QqctNY2V9HHplF1GOL-Uxyh3EiQJ0sh9gk7rhq8D9otLReEtAI_zVs164wedzT28hiN1JJZRg9K3osqzVbK5JGJWo2zNzw4EebMY5VrkMY6NYTasyILf-kAFYBsGAGTjmYP03JlObP2xe75TDe90wC_KiZGAiKpYxxmE-VcK00KStZIbdrcEAvsg8lNY%3D)

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: This is Joe Biden’s Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS

Make no mistake about it: what happening at the border is a crisis. It's Joe Biden's crisis. Even if he ignores it and his administration denies it.

name: John Burke
subject: California is LAST in the nation!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Our California kids are suffering by not being in the classroom. Read more >>
Peter, California’s public schools need to open, and they need to open now. Not months from now — NOW. We are last in the nation for getting our kids back into classrooms, and that is completely unacceptable. **Kevin Faulconer is determined to bring real leadership to Sacramento to open up our schools and make sure we never put our kids last again.** Private schools in California have been open for months. Schools in other states have been open. Teachers and children have been in the classroom across America, yet we continue to deny that right to our public school families. Kevin talked to KUSI News recently about Governor Gavin Newsom’s failure to get our schools open, and why it is CRITICAL that we recall him and get someone in office who knows how to get results. [**< < Please WATCH & SHARE the video by clicking here >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/62fb2c3289ba4588/1acf0891e7f9bb95c3d6b838967d376c/34943) **As the mayor of San Diego, Kevin Faulconer was able to bring Republicans and Democrats together to do what was best for our city.** He was the only big city mayor who was able to reduce homelessness by double digits. He kept our communities safe by refusing to defund the police and successfully fought multiple proposed tax hikes. It’s time to end the one-party rule in Sacramento and bring real reform to California. _Kevin Faulconer is the man for the job._ Thanks for your help,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/62fb2c3289ba4588/318eb1cee51e9266c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/62fb2c3289ba4588/045d7bef9d4d2c89c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/62fb2c3289ba4588/86ed68142e4db4f1c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Erica Smith
subject: Guilty on all counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
Black America needs more than one verdict.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/errYSuGdIlp3u-R77hRmrGbWxY8EdB_uyhBrJ3igIvY=/R69LKAHfXwoo7EhG7b2W4gQL0NdH8QTZyzjtwTp1mGA=)
_Content warning: This email discusses police brutality and violence against Black people._
---
**Guilty on all counts.**
I'm thinking about the literal millions of Black men and women who've been murdered, who were lynched and slaughtered with disregard, and never had their day in court, let alone a just ruling.
I'm thankful for accountability and I'm still mourning the death of George Floyd. For him and his family, there can never be true justice.
While we breathe a sigh of relief, let's remember that it was not just Derek Chauvin found guilty in that courtroom today. George Floyd's death was pre-mediated by a system that since its conception has disregarded Black and Brown lives. That system is also guilty, and while a judge will determine Derek Chauvin's sentence, we determine the future of our communities and our society. Justice cannot be confined to the jury deliberation room, the ruling, or the sentence.
We must understand that no single verdict can ease the burden of the ancestral trauma we carry.
**Black America needs more than one verdict.** We need reparations.
We need to continue to be, as we have been, vigilant vehicles of justice.
I'll continue to pray for George Floyd and his family. I'll continue to pray for Daunte Wright and for Adam Toledo, for all those whose names we know and for the many more whose names we never learned.
I'll continue to pray for the day that justice will not be an exception or a surprise, but an expectation and our reality.
Erica

Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
Erica For US
PO Box 1236
Gaston NC 27832 United States
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If at any point you'd like to stop receiving emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe here: [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/errYSuGdIlp3u-R77hRmrGbWxY8EdB_uyhBrJ3igIvY=/afoAMDuokEbbmIopDECHhcVRRx-kpZ0ZRsYSSijcryg=).

Friend,

**Maxine Waters just threw gasoline on the fire.**

---

As a Nation, we need to come together, and **career politician** Maxine Waters is not helping us unify whatsoever. It is typical of a career politician to push divisions to gain power and hold onto it. That is what is wrong with Washington D.C...the fact that she can preach such dangerous rhetoric and still get away with it.

Here is what she said:

**"We've got to stay on the street and we've got to get more active, we've got to get more confrontational,"** -Rep. Maxine Waters

**"We've got to make sure that they know that we mean business." -** Rep. Maxine Waters

Riddle me this:**Why is a California Representative in Minnesota encouraging people to resort to violence?**

We are all Americans, and as Americans, we have a constitutional right to protest whatever we see fit. This **DOESN'T** mean resorting to violence.

This ISN'T about Republican vs. Democrat, this is about our American values vs. the DANGEROUS fringes of the far-left. This needs to be stopped and she must be held accountable.

**[Will you help me hold CAREER politicians and their dangerous rhetoric accountable?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=f7eb01ca92174a508a8d976a4b722905&_e=DJOaXPKdgXSVTH47s0UMigG_myV0TgJCuSwErykGYJ_lk7RI92FmTTJ92Ld9-nBnQOCAtKgOjqzDUUs-n2aJBaNGdHRr7bi592-8gs4353BviSRmVKk7JrSc-Qu56sV6z1avh43vQhjx58_SqCa65aySq79LCBgAfvomrmMfPq80JxWKg6fDXnQ8Z6kHweyHokyTes51aOAUf63Jqa-VmSNK6vRcsV8qSc4QLNGlsIAdHZR1SgQ1afApxgaJW-XBzUvtbIbpG6zgNv7_xjG3OmchsEUH8MRgOsazfrMW56IJ6Oah0HCF_kN_kavjFVtGt4VjhXjIHXgoFsFDg9D9bbxVaVudDfO_6A2-tqLo55NyQ48KKKC5m95r_mqC2UBcxKZtl_DHANzPWz9uGCMBXv2ONBb1I4eTIjc4RSyLjDOOHhEa5zjXo98OOPCuOQAJdV8mXlUkSR7Ic0TH4a7CvIBCHjGkLhQcTAAfaY_CSdob5S0qqXl8kOa6T5QqSBvcFuzBcWyYeR52mHG0x3JCiQ%3D%3D)**

I won't take up any more of your time, please help me by donating whatever you can **[HERE.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=f7eb01ca92174a508a8d976a4b722905&_e=DJOaXPKdgXSVTH47s0UMigG_myV0TgJCuSwErykGYJ_lk7RI92FmTTJ92Ld9-nBnQOCAtKgOjqzDUUs-n2aJBaNGdHRr7bi592-8gs4353BviSRmVKk7JrSc-Qu56sV6z1avh43vQhjx58_SqCa65aySq79LCBgAfvomrmMfPq80JxWKg6fDXnQ8Z6kHweyHokyTes51aOAUf63Jqa-VmSNK6vRcsV8qSc4QLNGlsIAdHZR1SgQ1afApxgaJW-XBzUvtbIbpG6zgNv7_xjG3OmchsEUH8MRgOsazfrMW56IJ6Oah0HCF_kN_kavjFVtGbSaixeJfLCkaei08M71tgCfYAd2tAA9yJTfgKmrsGbjB8CNwVU6EBZfCCpAN2OWCBlCMw9abP6MLEN94_j03YBBPSwER9AKKES_jZK9tFBuD1Xj0JaaDdtFfHnpezsxWxze9xV_T1jiaRYiX14akgTmEBmuQajINvTMlZusqtTkYW5D6FWKKtHefaGeZz7Z4PAKd-OBZkD6JdQCcver-Wg%3D%3D)**

Here is what she said: "We've got to stay on the street and we've got to get more active, we've got to get more confrontational," -Rep. Maxine Waters "We've got to make sure that they know that we mean business." - Rep. Maxine Waters Riddle me this:Why is a California Representative in Minnesota encouraging people to resort to violence? We are all Americans, and as Americans, we have a constitutional right to protest whatever we see fit. This DOESN'T mean resorting to violence. This ISN'T about Republican vs. Democrat, this is about our American values vs. the DANGEROUS fringes of the far-left. This needs to be stopped and she must be held accountable. I won't take up any more of your time, please help me by donating whatever you can God Bless America, Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

body:
Hi there,
I hope you are doing well! I know it's been a tough year, but we're beginning to see the light at the end of the tunnel.
Last month, we passed the American Rescue Plan, getting checks to millions of people, making health care more affordable, expanding unemployment assistance, and more. Now, every American over 16 is eligible for the COVID-19 vaccine.
**But not a single Republican in Congress voted for the American Rescue Plan. And now, Mitch McConnell is directly targeting me, trying to flip this seat -- and the Senate -- back to the GOP. subject: The First 100 Days: 603 v. DC -- Who did it better?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman
body:
| |

| Friends, This weekend, Senate President Chuck Morse penned an Op-Ed in the Union Leader about the new NH Senate Republican majority's "First 100 Days" vs. the Biden Administration's "First 100 Days." Who do you think did it better -- the 603 or DC? Read Senator Morse's Op-Ed below and [click here to learn more about the stark differences between NH's successes and DC's failures of the past three months](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjY4MjkxODUxODQ2Njg2MDY3JmM9cDJzNSZlPTE5MjgmYj01Nzg5MjkwMjQmZD12Nng5dzlz.1QmEjy7XHD_CUmajNzxWTQwixTzeqLRcTDyST8stGgE).
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Sen. Chuck Morse: The first 100 days: NH v. DC
The “First 100 Days” benchmark has long been one of most famous ways to judge the progress made by new Presidents. Have promises been kept? Did the country make the correct choice? The First 100 Days of the Biden Administration is right around the corner, and you’re likely going to hear a lot about it in the coming weeks. However, here in New Hampshire we have another 100 Days benchmark coming up. NH voters chose to put the Republicans in charge of our State Legislature and, as a result, New Hampshire’s First 100 Days have been very, very different than Washington’s. Let’s start with taxes. Last year, NH Senate Republicans promised to hold the line on state taxes – we’ve done it. We’ve already passed SB99 to return more money to towns for property tax relief. We’ve cut taxes on our small businesses to help them survive these difficult times and we’re going to continue to fight against a state income tax. Meanwhile in Washington, the Biden Administration has admitted that we should expect the biggest Federal Income tax hike since the early 1990s, nearly $3 Trillion Dollars. NH is cutting taxes, while Washington is raising them. The Biden Administration’s First 100 Days’ spending will lead to another nearly $4 Trillion dollars being added to our national debt, bringing it to more than $24 Trillion dollars. Here in New Hampshire, the legislature is hard at work, crafting a balanced budget. In fact, despite the pandemic, in the current fiscal year, we are ahead by $125 million. Washington is drowning in debt, while NH is balancing budgets. You have likely heard about the Biden Administration’s plans to use the Executive Order process to push new gun control measures onto law abiding Americans during his First 100 Days. We couldn’t disagree with this decision more. In our First 100 Days, we have gone in the complete opposite direction, passing legislation to protect our Second Amendment rights, rather than curtailing them. We passed SB154, which would prevent any state official from enforcing any Executive Orders restricting our Second Amendment Rights and SB141, which ends the double background check system and streamlines the process to end unnecessarily long wait times for new handgun purchases. Washington is taking away your Second Amendment rights, while NH is protecting them. One of the Biden Administration’s biggest “wins” in his First 100 Days is HR1, a bill designed to take away the rights of the individual states to control their own elections, and instead put them in the hands of partisan Washington bureaucrats. This is of course a huge blow to securing the election integrity of our state and a major threat to our First-in-the Nation NH Presidential Primary. Nothing in this bill is good for the Granite State. That’s why the NH Senate has moved to ensure that our elections are conducted fairly and accurately, including SB54, designed to protect the integrity of the absentee ballot process by giving cities and towns the ability to confirm the identity of the voters. Washington is destroying election integrity, while NH is protecting it. Finally, you need only look to the COVID response and the re-opening of schools to see how much New Hampshire’s First 100 Days have differed from Washington’s. In Washington, the Biden Administration used the pandemic as an excuse to spend billions of dollars, mostly unrelated to the pandemic, and has refused to stand up to the Teachers Unions and follow the scientific recommendations to re-open our schools. Additionally, they have talked about a new “Vaccine Passport” that will prevent those that haven’t had the opportunity or cannot receive the vaccine for health or other reasons, from potentially entering businesses, traveling, or even going to work. New Hampshire on the other hand has seen one of the nation’s fastest and most efficient vaccine rollouts and will have all of our public schools fully open by the end of the month. We will also stand up and oppose the Biden Administration’s dangerous “Vaccine Passport” idea. New Hampshire is leading the way to ending the pandemic, while Washington is prolonging it and making it worse. Your Republican-led New Hampshire Senate has spent their First 100 Days fighting for New Hampshire against Washington politicians that seem determined to undermine our “Live Free or Die” principles. 100 Days in, I am very proud of the work that our Republican-led State Senate has done. Perhaps President Biden should follow our lead for his next 100 Days.

In our First 100 Days, we have gone in the complete opposite direction, passing legislation to protect our Second Amendment rights, rather than curtailing them. We passed SB154, which would prevent any state official from enforcing any Executive Orders restricting our Second Amendment Rights and SB141, which ends the double background check system and streamlines the process to end unnecessarily long wait times for new handgun purchases. Washington is taking away your Second Amendment rights, while NH is protecting them. One of the Biden Administration’s biggest “wins” in his First 100 Days is HR1, a bill designed to take away the rights of the individual states to control their own elections, and instead put them in the hands of partisan Washington bureaucrats. This is of course a huge blow to securing the election integrity of our state and a major threat to our First-in-the Nation NH Presidential Primary. Nothing in this bill is good for the Granite State. That’s why the NH Senate has moved to ensure that our elections are conducted fairly and accurately, including SB54, designed to protect the integrity of the absentee ballot process by giving cities and towns the ability to confirm the identity of the voters. Washington is destroying election integrity, while NH is protecting it. Finally, you need only look to the COVID response and the re-opening of schools to see how much New Hampshire’s First 100 Days have differed from Washington’s. In Washington, the Biden Administration used the pandemic as an excuse to spend billions of dollars, mostly unrelated to the pandemic, and has refused to stand up to the Teachers Unions and follow the scientific recommendations to re-open our schools. Additionally, they have talked about a new “Vaccine Passport” that will prevent those that haven’t had the opportunity or cannot receive the vaccine for health or other reasons, from potentially entering businesses, traveling, or even going to work. New Hampshire on the other hand has seen one of the nation’s fastest and most efficient vaccine rollouts and will have all of our public schools fully open by the end of the month. We will also stand up and oppose the Biden Administration’s dangerous “Vaccine Passport” idea. New Hampshire is leading the way to ending the pandemic, while Washington is prolonging it and making it worse. Your Republican-led New Hampshire Senate has spent their First 100 Days fighting for New Hampshire against Washington politicians that seem determined to undermine our “Live Free or Die” principles. 100 Days in, I am very proud of the work that our Republican-led State Senate has done. Perhaps President Biden should follow our lead for his next 100 Days. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

clean_body: I have exciting news for you. | Peter, I am excited to tell you that I am joining Governor Greitens’ team as National Chair of his Senate campaign for the open seat in Missouri. Governor Greitens is a Navy SEAL who has stood with President Donald J. Trump and has a proven record of advancing conservative, America First policies. As my first order of business, I want to help Governor Greitens CRUSH his end-of-month fundraising goal. I most recently served President Trump as the National Chair of Trump Victory Finance Committee in 2020. The 2022 midterm elections are our chance to help President Trump take back the reins of our country from the radical Left. That’s why it’s simply not enough to elect Republicans next year... ...We need to elect conservatives like Governor Greitens who will put America First and have the spine to FIGHT for our values. With your help, we will crush Governor Greitens’ fundraising goal just like we did for President Trump last year. Thank you, Kimberly Guilfoyle National Chair Greitens for U.S. Senate Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
